verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got a longing now to go, To live up there in my new home. Oh won't you come and walk with me along the way. What priceless beauty we would share, In a land so bright and fair. I know that heaven will be mine someday.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know that heaven will be mine, And our love will always shine. I'm going to a land across the mystic sea. Oh won't you meet me over there, Where all the joy will ever share. I know that heaven will be mine someday.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes will you meet me over there, A place of beauty, rich and rare To live with all the saints Where the love of god will shine, And it's glory will be mine. I know that heaven will be mine someday.
